title: Sumadijska Kockica
description: Pack made for small streamers and friends, mainly focused on vanilla ++ experience with create and ae2
body:
**Balkan friends playing Minecraft in short.**

Modpack is focused on vanilla with some quality of life mods.

There is no fun if you dont get some awesome mods like:
- Create
- AE2
- Mythical Mounts
- Sophisticated Backpacks and Storage
- Carry On


Modpack is played by 3 small streamers, their channels will be added once they start streaming
mod actively :)

**_Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/CxcaE6fgcg)_**
